chapter_title.ar: بَابُ مَا يَجِبُ مِنْ ذِكْرِ اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ فِي كُلِّ مَجْلِسٍ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 21 – What is Obligated from the Mention of Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic in every gathering

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (12/127)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (12/127)
text: فِيمَا نَاجَى اللَّهُ بِهِ مُوسَى ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ يَا مُوسَى لَا تَنْسَنِي عَلَى كُلِّ حَالٍ فَإِنَّ نِسْيَانِي يُمِيتُ الْقَلْبَ .

en.hubeali: ‘He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Among what Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Whispered to Musa<sup>as</sup> with was that He<sup>azwj</sup> Said: “O Musa<sup>as</sup>! Do not forget Me<sup>azwj</sup> upon every state, for forgetting Me<sup>azwj</sup> would cause the heart to die’.
en.sarwar: 11. Through the same chain of narrators (it is narrated from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following): “Abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) has said, ‘Of the words of Allah to Moses was that He said, “O Moses do not forget Me in any condition; forgetting Me deadens a heart.”’
